raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I received a fraud alert from Barclays Credit Card services that 3 charges from XXXX had been posted to my account. I called Barclays customer service within 30 minutes of receiving the notice and explained all 3 charges were fraudulent. I was told they would remove all three charges. I asked if I need to destroy my credit card and be supplied a new card but was told that was not necessary. My XX/XX/XXXX statement showed the 3 charges were removed. I received my XX/XX/XXXX statement on XX/XX/XXXX and one of the 3 charges in the amount of {$110.00} was listed on the statement. I checked my XXXX Account and there was a charge in the amount of {$110.00}, but it was listed to a credit card with the last four digits XXXX, ( see attached statement ). My credit cards last four digits is XXXX, see attached statement. I called XXXX 's fraud investigation and spoke with XXXX, she informed me the vendor had provided documentation that was acceptable to XXXX 's so one of the 3 charges was reinstated on the statement. I explained this was a mistake and ask to speak with a supervisor ; I was denied. I requested and email address and was denied. XXXX XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX XXXX, I spoke with XXXX XXXX after I provided him my name and account number, I was told the computer system was down and I would need to call back. At that point, I filed a complaint with CFPB.
